decision_constraints.description: Permitted review-only actions, no-trade symbols, and mandate notes.

market_signals.description: Optional macro notes, analyst comments, or signal snippets for LLM interpretation.

portfolio.description: Holdings with symbol and quantity or market value.

risk_policy.description: Drawdown, VaR/CVaR, concentration, cash, liquidity, and turnover limits.

input_folder.description: Default local input folder for sample files or user-provided files.

output_folder.description: Default local output folder for generated artifacts and reports.

contract.summary: Portfolio risk can change quickly during shocks; users need an assistant that makes downside exposure and possible next steps easier to review.
users: Investors, advisors, portfolio managers, treasury teams, and fintech operators.

description: A portfolio risk co-worker for review-only market and scenario analysis. Give it holdings, benchmark weights, risk limits, decision constraints, optional market notes, and an input folder for supporting files; it pulls public market context, runs risk and simulation math, benchmarks possible actions, and writes risk summaries and review reports to the output folder.

steps.goal: Normalize holdings, constraints, benchmark, and policy.
steps.label: Load Portfolio Context

steps.goal: Fetch fresh public quote/history data for portfolio and benchmark symbols.
steps.label: Load Public Market Data

steps.goal: Build returns, covariance, VaR/CVaR, drawdown, beta, concentration, and policy violations.
steps.label: Compute Risk State

steps.goal: Propose review-only actions and run Monte Carlo/historical stress simulations.
steps.label: Simulate Decision Candidates

steps.goal: Benchmark candidates, select a review recommendation, and use the LLM only to draft the report.
steps.label: Evaluate And Write Report

rules.message: Human approval is required before this workflow writes or releases high-impact recommendations.

nodes.role: Benchmark candidates, select a review recommendation, and use the LLM only to draft the report.

metadata.agent_role: LLM report writer that summarizes supplied market signals and structured simulation evidence; deterministic finance workers propose, simulate, evaluate, and benchmark decisions.

with.role: Benchmark candidates, select a review recommendation, and use the LLM only to draft the report.

rendered_node.role: Benchmark candidates, select a review recommendation, and use the LLM only to draft the report.

metadata.customizable_for: Wealth management, treasury review, family offices, robo-advisory risk workflows, portfolio monitoring, and review-only advisor workbenches.
metadata.description: A portfolio risk co-worker for review-only market and scenario analysis. Give it holdings, benchmark weights, risk limits, decision constraints, optional market notes, and an input folder for supporting files; it pulls public market context, runs risk and simulation math, benchmarks possible actions, and writes risk summaries and review reports to the output folder.

human_control.reason: Human approval is required before high-impact downstream actions such as place_trade, rebalance_portfolio, send_order.

fields.description: Symbols and quantities or market values to review.
fields.label: Portfolio holdings

fields.description: Public market data adapter used for quote/history lookup.
fields.label: Market data provider

fields.description: Number of simulation paths per candidate decision.
fields.label: Monte Carlo paths
Input folder
fields.description: Default local input folder for sample files or user-provided files.

fields.label: Output folder
fields.description: Default local output folder for generated artifacts and reports.

init_config_review.instruction: When running in OtterDesk, show these overwriteable fields during init config and ask the user to change them or keep the defaults before launch.

input_contract.description: Portfolio teams need reviewable real-time risk advice that separates deterministic financial engineering from LLM narrative generation.

optional_inputs.description: Macro notes, analyst comments, or signal snippets for LLM interpretation.
example: Credit spreads widened in the latest session.
optional_inputs.name: market_signals

optional_inputs.description: Override the configured number of Monte Carlo paths.
optional_inputs.name: monte_carlo_paths
input_folder
optional_inputs.description: Default local input folder for sample files or user-provided files.

optional_inputs.name: output_folder
optional_inputs.description: Default local output folder for generated artifacts and reports.

file.description: Local JSON portfolio and policy file.

json.description: Inline real portfolio and policy payload.

mock.description: Demo portfolio shape for validation only; production path uses public market data.

public_market.description: Real public market quote/history lookup for supplied symbols.

sample_file.description: Sample review-only portfolio scenario loaded from disk.

required_inputs.description: Holdings with symbol and quantity or market value.
required_inputs.name: portfolio

required_inputs.description: Drawdown, VaR/CVaR, concentration, cash, liquidity, and turnover limits.
required_inputs.name: risk_policy

required_inputs.description: Permitted review-only actions, no-trade symbols, tax notes, and mandate constraints.
required_inputs.name: decision_constraints

validation_rules: required market data must be fresh or the run fails closed

artifacts.description: Stable run-store files and domain-specific outputs.

human.description: Human notices, approval requests, responses, timeouts, and applied decisions.

input_skills.description: Connector-backed or reusable skill-backed input sources.

inputs.description: Resolved runtime inputs and adapter provenance.

logs.description: Runtime stdout/stderr and explicit log artifacts.

output_skills.description: Optional fan-out destinations after local run-store writes.

outputs.description: Primary result and final user-facing artifact.

resources.description: Resource samples such as token, runtime, connector, and disk usage.

streams.description: Named data or event streams exposed by the blueprint.

knowledge_rag.description: Optional local blueprint knowledge retrieval used to ground actor prompts and tool planning.

agentic_research.description: Bounded LLM-selected or actor-guided tool contract for domain work.

metadata.llm_agent_role: LLM report writer that summarizes supplied market signals and structured simulation evidence; deterministic finance workers propose, simulate, evaluate, and benchmark decisions.
metadata.name: Portfolio Risk Review Assistant
metadata.output: Review-only risk advisor report with ranked simulated decisions, benchmark comparison, policy violations, and market data source refs.

final_artifact.description: The durable user-facing artifact should summarize the result, recommendation, confidence, evidence, next steps, and source references.

output_contract.stdout: JSON object with timeline, state_changes, final_artifact, and llm metadata

metadata.problem_solved: Portfolio teams need reviewable real-time risk advice that separates deterministic financial engineering from LLM narrative generation.
runtime_features: actor-style LLM specialists use retrieved policy context when available

simulation.type: Real-time public-market portfolio risk review with Monte Carlo decision benchmarking.

metadata.simulation_type: Real-time public-market portfolio risk review with Monte Carlo decision benchmarking.

standard.execution_model: load_metadata -> resolve_config -> load_inputs -> start_run_store -> load_public_market_data -> compute_risk_state -> propose_decisions -> simulate_decisions -> evaluate_and_benchmark -> call_llm_report_writer -> request_human_input -> emit_events -> write_final_artifact -> fan_out_output_skills

metadata.target_user: Investors, advisors, portfolio managers, treasury teams, and fintech operators.
metadata.target_users: Investors, advisors, portfolio managers, treasury teams, and fintech operators.

knowledge_rag.purpose: Retrieve portfolio risk-review guidance for market-data freshness, deterministic risk math, scenario analysis, and review-only decision language.
knowledge_rag.grounding_policy: Use retrieved local blueprint knowledge to improve actor review prompts; do not invent facts when retrieval is unavailable.
knowledge_rag.privacy: index local blueprint knowledge only; do not index private run documents unless a future runtime explicitly opts in

agentic_research.note: Portfolio actors use deterministic market-data and simulation tools; LLM narrative must stay grounded in those outputs.

name: Portfolio Risk Review Assistant

workers.role: Compute returns, covariance, volatility, beta, VaR, CVaR, drawdown, concentration, and policy breaches
Benchmark candidates against no-action and policy metrics
Write the review report from structured metrics and supplied market signals
Validate and normalize portfolio, policy, and constraints
Fetch public Yahoo chart quote/history data and enforce freshness
Run seeded Monte Carlo and historical stress simulation for each candidate

knowledge_rag.purpose: Retrieve portfolio risk-review guidance for market-data freshness, deterministic risk math, scenario analysis, and review-only decision language.
knowledge_rag.grounding_policy: Use retrieved local blueprint knowledge to improve actor review prompts; do not invent facts when retrieval is unavailable.
knowledge_rag.privacy: index local blueprint knowledge only; do not index private run documents unless a future runtime explicitly opts in

agentic_research.note: Portfolio actors use deterministic market-data and simulation tools; LLM narrative must stay grounded in those outputs.
